title: My School Day
transcript: I go to school every morning. My class starts at seven o'clock. I study English, Math, and Science. My favorite subject is English.
chunks: I go to school every morning.
My class starts at seven o'clock.
I study English, Math, and Science.
My favorite subject is English.
notes: Focus on rhythm and natural stress

title: After School Activities
transcript: After school, I usually play football with my friends. Sometimes we go to the library together. I always finish my homework before dinner. My teacher says I am a good student.
chunks: After school, I usually play football with my friends.
Sometimes we go to the library together.
I always finish my homework before dinner.
My teacher says I am a good student.
notes: Pay attention to linking sounds between words

title: My Weekend Hobbies
transcript: On weekends, I enjoy painting and reading books. I also like listening to music in my free time. My sister and I sometimes bake cookies together. We love spending time at home.
chunks: On weekends, I enjoy painting and reading books.
I also like listening to music in my free time.
My sister and I sometimes bake cookies together.
We love spending time at home.
notes: Focus on the -ing endings and natural intonation

title: Sports and Exercise
transcript: I have been playing tennis since I was ten years old. It is a great way to stay fit and have fun at the same time. My coach always tells me to keep my eye on the ball. I practice three times a week at the local sports centre.
chunks: I have been playing tennis since I was ten years old.
It is a great way to stay fit and have fun at the same time.
My coach always tells me to keep my eye on the ball.
I practice three times a week at the local sports centre.
notes: Notice the present perfect tense rhythm

title: My Family
transcript: I have a small but happy family. My father works as an engineer and my mother is a nurse. I have one older brother and one younger sister. We eat dinner together every evening.
chunks: I have a small but happy family.
My father works as an engineer and my mother is a nurse.
I have one older brother and one younger sister.
We eat dinner together every evening.
notes: Practice the natural pauses within long sentences

title: Family Traditions
transcript: Every Sunday, my whole family gets together for a big lunch. My grandmother cooks traditional dishes that everyone loves. After eating, we sit on the porch and tell stories. These moments are my favourite memories from childhood.
chunks: Every Sunday, my whole family gets together for a big lunch.
My grandmother cooks traditional dishes that everyone loves.
After eating, we sit on the porch and tell stories.
These moments are my favourite memories from childhood.
notes: Listen for the emotion and warmth in the speaker's voice

title: Favourite Foods
transcript: My favourite food is pizza with lots of cheese and vegetables. I also love eating fresh fruit in the morning. My mother makes delicious soup every winter. I try to eat healthy food most of the time.
chunks: My favourite food is pizza with lots of cheese and vegetables.
I also love eating fresh fruit in the morning.
My mother makes delicious soup every winter.
I try to eat healthy food most of the time.
notes: Focus on the stress pattern in adjectives before nouns

title: Cooking a Meal
transcript: Last weekend, I decided to cook a three-course meal for my family. I started with a tomato and basil soup, which took about thirty minutes to prepare. For the main course, I made pasta with a creamy mushroom sauce. Everyone was impressed by my cooking skills.
chunks: Last weekend, I decided to cook a three-course meal for my family.
I started with a tomato and basil soup, which took about thirty minutes to prepare.
For the main course, I made pasta with a creamy mushroom sauce.
Everyone was impressed by my cooking skills.
notes: Pay attention to the past tense verb endings

title: Morning Routine
transcript: I wake up at six thirty every morning. First, I brush my teeth and wash my face. Then I get dressed and have a healthy breakfast. I leave the house at seven fifteen to catch the bus.
chunks: I wake up at six thirty every morning.
First, I brush my teeth and wash my face.
Then I get dressed and have a healthy breakfast.
I leave the house at seven fifteen to catch the bus.
notes: Practice the sequence words: first, then, after that

title: A Busy Weekday
transcript: My weekdays are extremely busy with work, exercise, and personal commitments. I commute to the office by train, which gives me time to read or listen to podcasts. During lunch, I usually eat at my desk while checking emails. By the time I get home, I am completely exhausted.
chunks: My weekdays are extremely busy with work, exercise, and personal commitments.
I commute to the office by train, which gives me time to read or listen to podcasts.
During lunch, I usually eat at my desk while checking emails.
By the time I get home, I am completely exhausted.
notes: Focus on complex sentence rhythm and relative clauses
